name: CSR Limited
description: CSR Limited is a leading building products company in Australia and New Zealand. Founded in 1855 as the Colonial Sugar Refining Company, the company has evolved from its sugar refining origins to become a major manufacturer and supplier of building materials. CSR's portfolio includes some of the most trusted brand names in the construction industry, such as Gyprock plasterboard, Bradford insulation, Hebel autoclaved aerated concrete, and Monier roof tiles. The company operates a network of manufacturing facilities and distribution centers, providing innovative and sustainable building solutions for residential and commercial construction projects.
